COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.Title: Compendium Merger
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.ScopeHint: Merges Item compendiums only, and only Items (weapons/equipment/consumables/tools/loot/containers) and Spells for now — feats, classes, subclasses, backgrounds, and species are left alone and skipped.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.NoSources: No Item compendiums are available. Enable some under your world's Compendium Packs settings first.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.PriorityHint: Check the folders to merge — every Item compendium inside a checked folder is included. Order matters: if the same name shows up in more than one checked folder, the one closer to the top wins. Compendiums with no parent folder are grouped under "(No Folder)". Drag isn't supported — use the arrows to reorder.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.RebuildWarning: Running the merge completely wipes and rebuilds the "Merged Items" and "Merged Spells" compendiums from your checked sources. Any manual edits made directly inside those two compendiums will be lost — edit the sources instead, then re-run.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.NoSourcesChec: Check at least one source folder before running the merge.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.MergeFailed: The merge failed — check the browser console (F12) for details.
